response_text:
ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR flight_number : varchar
ATTR airline_id : varchar : FK
ATTR departure_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR arrival_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR aircraft_id : varchar : FK
ATTR status : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_id
ATTR airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_code : varchar
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_id : varchar : FK
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY Location
PK location_id
ATTR location_id : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_id
ATTR airline_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_code : varchar
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Aircraft
PK aircraft_id
ATTR aircraft_id : varchar : PK
ATTR registration : varchar
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status_description : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightCrewAssignment
PK flight_id, crew_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR role : varchar

REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1..N : FK=airline_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1..N : FK=departure_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1..N : FK=arrival_airport_id
REL Airport -> Location : 1 -> 1 : FK=location_id
REL Flight -> Aircraft : 1 -> 1..N : FK=aircraft_id
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=status
REL Flight -> FlightCrewAssignment : 1 -> 0..N : FK=flight_id
REL CrewMember -> FlightCrewAssignment : 1 -> 0..N : FK=crew_id
